name: fetch-frequencies registry: a per-source override wins over the per-registry default
command:
printf 'default: weekly
registries:
  standards: 12h
sources:
  aws-well-architected: 5m
' > ff.yaml && bash "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/fetch-frequency-registry.sh" --source-id aws-well-architected --registry standards --file "$PWD/ff.yaml"
